message:
fix(cli): update migrate_is_idempotent test to use canonical SQLite init path

The migrate_is_idempotent test was still calling the old
handle_migrate_with_database_url() function which routes through the
Franken SQLite path. Update it to use init_schema_sqlite_canonical()
which matches the production migration flow after the schema migration
routing fix in c630e7f, preventing false test failures from path
mismatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
